overview.description: The WisdomTree Efficient Long/Short U.S. Equity Fund (WTLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long/short alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF that combines a US long/short equity strategy with a long-only US equity allocation. The fund uses model-driven security selection and derivatives to maintain roughly balanced exposure between the two strategies while seeking total return. WTLS was launched on Jan 22, 2026 and is issued by WisdomTree.
